zh.lifeSummary: 當Bartholomew Appleyard於大約1335年出生在英國諾福爾可諾維其時，他的父親Nicholas de Appleyard31歲，母親Mrs. Appleyard24歲。他和Emma de Bumpsteade至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他於1412年被列為burgess in parliament。他去世於大約1412年在他的家鄉享年79歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bartholomew Appleyard于大约1335年出生在英国諾福爾可諾維其时，他的父亲Nicholas de Appleyard31岁，母亲Mrs. Appleyard24岁。他和Emma de Bumpsteade至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他于1412年被列为burgess in parliament。他去世于大约1412年在他的家乡享年79岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Appleyard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): topographic name for someone who lived by an apple orchard, Middle English appleyard, or a habitational name from Appleyard in Yorkshire with the same etymology. There are several places called with this term, of which the most significant as a source of surnames is in Yorkshire. It is also an Americanized form of Applegarth , which in Scandinavian-speaking areas replaced the native Appleton .

variants.name: Applegarth
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish: topographic name from northern Middle English applegarth ‘apple orchard’ (Old Norse apaldr ‘apple tree’ + garthr ‘enclosure’), or a habitational name from a place so named, of which there are examples in Cumbria and North and East Yorkshire, as well as in the county of Dumfries.

nameMeanings.name: Bartholomew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Bartholomew Appleyard was born about 1335, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, his father, Nicholas de Appleyard, was 31 and his mother, Mrs. Appleyard, was 24. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Emma de Bumpsteade. In 1412, at the age of 78, his occupation is listed as burgess in parliament. He died about 1412, in his hometown, at the age of 79, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bartholomew Appleyard est né environ 1335, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas de Appleyard, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Appleyard, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Emma de Bumpsteade. En 1412, à l’âge de 78 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est burgess in parliament. Il est décédé environ 1412, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bartholomew Appleyard um 1335 in Norwich, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Appleyard 31 und seine Mutter Mrs. Appleyard 24. Er hatte mit Emma de Bumpsteade mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1412, als er 78 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als burgess in parliament aufgeführt. Er starb um 1412 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomew Appleyard è nato il circa 1335 nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Nicholas de Appleyard, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Appleyard, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Emma de Bumpsteade. Nel 1412, all'età di 78 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come burgess in parliament. Morì circa 1412, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Bartholomew Appleyardが約1335年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Appleyardは31歳，母Mrs. Appleyardは24歳であった。彼はEmma de Bumpsteadeとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。1412年，78歳の時，職業はburgess in parliamentと記録されている。彼は約1412年に故郷で79歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bartholomew Appleyard(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Appleyard(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Appleyard(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Emma de Bumpsteade(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1412년, 78세의 나이로 그의 직업은 burgess in parliament이었다. 그는 대략 1412년 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1335–about 1412: tany ho any amin'ny 1335–tany ho any amin'ny 1412

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomew Appleyard nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas de Appleyard, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Appleyard, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Emma de Bumpsteade. Em 1412, com 78 anos, sua profissão aparece como burgess in parliament. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1412, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bartholomew Appleyard родился около 1335 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Appleyard было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Appleyard, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Emma de Bumpsteade. В 1412 году, в возрасте 78 лет,  он работал по профессии burgess in parliament. Он умер около 1412 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bartholomew Appleyard nació aproximadamente 1335, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas de Appleyard, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs. Appleyard, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Emma de Bumpsteade. En 1412, a la edad de 78 años, su ocupación registrada era burgess in parliament. Murió aproximadamente 1412, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
